nasb.text: Do you not know that the Lord God of Israel gave the rule over Israel forever to David and his sons by a covenant of salt?

esv.text: Ought you not to know that the Lord God of Israel gave the kingship over Israel forever to David and his sons by a covenant of salt?

cnv.text: 耶和華以色列的　神曾經立了鹽約，要把以色列國永遠賜給大衛和他的子孫，你們不知道嗎？

ccb.text: 你们不知道以色列的上帝耶和华曾经立下永世之约，要把以色列国永远赐给大卫和他的子孙吗？
